# The Stoop LLC — https://thestooppgh.com

The Stoop is a Pittsburgh-based digital advertising and influencer marketing agency. We help brands scale through authentic influencer partnerships, paid media, organic social management, content production, and marketing automation. We also run a 1-on-1 influencer coaching program for creators building sustainable careers.

## Crawler policy

LLM crawlers are welcome to access this site's public content for retrieval, citation, and indexing.

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /
